official_title: A Prospective Study to Evaluate the Clinical Performance and Safety of the SIRIUS Endoscope System in Laparoscopic Gynecological Surgery.

pmids.citation: Ng TY, Ngu SF, Kam TYD, Ng SY, Lo PLB. First in-human trial and prospective case series of an articulated laparoscopic camera system in minimally invasive surgery in gynecology: an IDEAL stage 1 and 2a study. BMJ Surg Interv Health Technol. 2022 Mar 4;4(1):e000117. doi: 10.1136/bmjsit-2021-000117. eCollection 2022.
